title: T-017 — API: WO numbering (WIP-<suffix>-<sequence>)
prompt:
Implement WO numbering per PRD §14.1 default `WIP-{SUFFIX}-{NNNNNNN}` (7-digit zero-padded sequence). Service `src/lib/services/wo-numbering.ts` exposes `generateWoNumber(tenantId, productId)`. Suffix derived from product.code 2-letter prefix (uppercase, fallback 'XX'). Sequence monotonic per (tenant_id, suffix). Concurrency-safe via advisory lock or sequence table.

RED test runs 50 concurrent calls for same suffix → 50 distinct sequential numbers.

pipeline_inputs.description: Concurrency-safe WO numbering with WIP-<2letter>-<7digit> pattern from planning_settings.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reuse `planning_number_sequences` table from T-009 with sequence_kind='wo:<SUFFIX>'. Pattern read from planning_settings.wo_number_format; supports {SUFFIX} and {NNNNNNN} ICU placeholders. Suffix lookup helper covers products.code starting characters. Strict regex check on output: ^WIP-[A-Z]{2}-\d{7}$.
acceptance_criteria: Given suffix 'BK' and 50 concurrent calls, when promises resolve, then 50 distinct sequential numbers WIP-BK-0000001..WIP-BK-0000050 are returned.
Given product.code='cake-XL' (lowercase), when generateWoNumber runs, then suffix uppercases to 'CA' and number format matches regex.
Given two tenants T1 (suffix 'BK' seq 5) and T2 (first 'BK' call), when both run, then T1 yields '0000006' and T2 yields '0000001' independently.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/lib/services/__tests__/wo-numbering.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED concurrency test, regex strict-match test, cross-tenant isolation test.
risk_red_lines: Do not generate non-WIP-prefixed numbers — V-PLAN-WO-010 hard block.
Do not allow sequence collisions under concurrent calls.
